from tuya_connector import TuyaOpenAPI
import time
import sys

ACCESS_ID = "m3negp3fvw7ugp7cqae8"
ACCESS_SECRET = "45b5bc2934f7437bb52739090eb96c5c"
DEVICE_ID = "d78fcea6e6c3b03d40zcwp"

ENDPOINT = "https://openapi.tuya.in"  # global (most stable)

def connect():
    try:
        api = TuyaOpenAPI(ENDPOINT, ACCESS_ID, ACCESS_SECRET)
        api.connect()
        print("✅ Connected to Tuya Cloud")
        return api
    except Exception as e:
        print("❌ Failed to connect to Tuya Cloud")
        print(e)
        sys.exit(1)
